serverInfo.name: Bernstein MCP Server
serverInfo.description: Multi-agent orchestration system for AI coding agents. Create tasks, monitor agents, check status, track costs via MCP tools. Run locally via stdio transport after pipx install bernstein.

tools.name: bernstein_run
tools.description: Start an orchestration run with a goal

tools.name: bernstein_tasks
tools.description: List all tasks and their states

tools.name: bernstein_cost
tools.description: Get cost breakdown for current run

tools.name: bernstein_approve
tools.description: Approve a task that needs human review
